universe: top12 USDT perps (BTC ETH BNB SOL XRP ADA DOGE LTC LINK AVAX TRX DOT), 2022-01-01..2026-06-18, daily
mechanism: Cross-sectional delta-neutral funding carry. Weekly funding sum -> 12-week rolling-mean persistence score. Hold fixed basket: long-carry (short perp/long spot) on highest-persistent-funding coins, short-carry on most-negative; equal-weight, gross|w|=1. Weekly rebalance with rank-exit hysteresis band (hold while still within basket_n+hyst ranks). Signal shifted 1 bar.
data_caveats: Delta-neutral close-to-close maxDD (-0.25%) is an ILLUSION: excludes intraday basis moves, margin/liquidation path, spot-borrow cost/availability for short-carry legs, and real spot+perp execution. All-daily PPY=365 (no 8h/daily DSR mixing). Spot & perp aligned on same 00:00 UTC daily open_time index; no frozen/post-settlement bars (perpetuals); 1629/1630 days had full 3 funding events.
notes: Weekly rebalance + rank hysteresis FIXED the turnover that killed the 8h version: OOS pair-turnover 0.0138/bar (was 0.42) -> ~1%/yr cost (was 46%). OOS net Sharpe 6.80 SURVIVES 10bp/leg cost (gross 10.07). Deflated: DSR*=0.172 vs OOS sr_pp=0.356, deflated PSR=1.0. Robust across grid (95% of 81 variants OOS-profitable, median OOS Sharpe 2.64). Market-neutral (OOS beta to BTC 0.0004). Look-ahead probe: lag0/1/2/3 -> Sharpe 7.07/6.80/6.76/6.62, edge survives execution delay (persistence, not timing). Real caveat: tiny vol (0.56%/yr) -> needs leverage; gross|w|=1 so long/short not strictly dollar-balanced when basket sizes differ.
